name: Slack
auth_note: OAuth2 for apps you create at api.slack.com; bot/user tokens issued per workspace.
access_note: Anyone can create a Slack app and install to a workspace; distribution to others may need review.
mcp_note: Widely used community/reference Slack MCP servers; no clearly Slack-maintained official one.
main_blocker: None; self-serve OAuth app with broad Web API.

name: Twilio
one_liner: Programmable SMS, voice and messaging APIs
auth_note: Basic auth with Account SID + Auth Token; scoped API Keys also supported.
access_note: Free trial account with credit; upgrade to pay-as-you-go.
mcp_note: Twilio published an (alpha) official MCP server for SMS/voice.
main_blocker: None; self-serve keys and broad REST API.

name: Zoho Cliq
one_liner: Zoho team chat and collaboration app
auth_note: OAuth 2.0 token required per request; register client in Zoho Developer Console.
access_note: Free Zoho account; self-register OAuth client in Zoho API Console.
mcp_note: No official Zoho Cliq MCP identified; community options unclear.
main_blocker: None; self-serve OAuth, though surface narrower than Slack.

name: Lark (Larksuite)
one_liner: Enterprise messaging, docs and collaboration suite
auth_note: OAuth2 plus tenant/app access tokens; self-serve app creation (incl. OAuth device flow).
access_note: Create custom app in developer console; org-wide publishing needs admin approval.
main_blocker: None for dev; publishing to a tenant needs admin approval.

name: Pumble
auth_note: API key generated after installing the Pumble API addon in the workspace.
access_note: Requires installing the API-keys addon; then keys are self-generated.
mcp_note: Community Pumble MCP servers exist (e.g. on LobeHub).
main_blocker: Addon install requirement and narrow endpoint set (messages/reactions/channels).

name: Discord
one_liner: Community chat, voice and bot platform
auth_note: OAuth2 for apps; bot token for the Bot API. Composio uses OAuth2.
access_note: Create an application/bot in the Discord Developer Portal for free.
mcp_note: No official Discord-maintained MCP; active community servers.

name: Telegram
one_liner: Messaging app with open Bot API
auth_note: Bot token from BotFather; MTProto client API uses api_id/api_hash.
access_note: Create a bot via BotFather instantly and free.

name: WhatsApp Business
one_liner: Business messaging via Meta WhatsApp Cloud API
auth_note: Meta system-user/access tokens via a Meta app; only Business accounts supported.
access_note: Requires Meta app, WhatsApp Business Account, and business verification.
mcp_note: Community WhatsApp MCP servers; no official Meta MCP.
main_blocker: Meta business verification and app setup friction before production.

name: Aircall
one_liner: Cloud phone system for support and sales
auth_note: Basic auth with api_id:api_token from dashboard; OAuth required for Marketplace partner apps.
access_note: Need a paid Aircall account to generate API keys; OAuth apps gated to partners.
main_blocker: Requires a paid Aircall subscription; OAuth distribution is partner-gated.

name: Vonage
one_liner: Communications APIs for SMS, voice, verify
auth_note: API key + secret (Basic) for most APIs; JWT/application creds for Voice and Messages.
access_note: Self-serve signup with free trial credit; keys issued on account creation.
main_blocker: None; self-serve keys, broad REST API.
